sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f with 20% initial active equity allocation. Position count derived from Equation 2.09a: N = ln(((Goal-1)/ACTV)+1)/ln(Geometric Mean). Goal parameter set by desired wealth multiple (e.g., Goal=6 to double $100k account). Uses geometric mean-based TWR optimization.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f position sizing where initial equity allocation is 20% of total account, with position size calculated to achieve a specific wealth growth goal (TWR) through the static fractional f equation.
